title: Bridge Essay: Psychedelic-assisted Therapy as a Promising Treatment for Irritable Bowel Syndrome.
concept: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**Psychedelic-assisted Therapy as a Promising Treatment for Irritable Bowel Syndrome.** - J Clin Gastroenterol (2025). DOI: 10.1097/MCG.0000000000002149. PMID: 39998940. Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) is prevalent and can be disabling. Many patients remain symptomatic despite behavioral and medical therapies. Psychedelic-assisted therapy (PAT), in which serotonergic agents like psilocybin are administered in a psychotherapeutic context, has shown promise for refractory psychiatric disorders, including major depressive disorder and post-traumatic stress disorder.
